docs.text: Hey! I'm Rennan Cockles 👋 I'm a software/data engineer from Brazil. 🇧🇷 I have a bachelor's degree in Computer Engineering with emphasis on computational modeling by the State University of Rio de Janeiro (UERJ). 👨‍🎓 I currently work as a specialist data engineer at Wittel and Blue Orange 👨‍💼 I have more than 10 years of experience in several technology areas such as software engineer, data engineer, artificial intelligence and infrastructure. 👨‍💻 I love to solve problems and like to think that there is always a simple solution to them and usually automating is one of them. 🤓 I like to build things with Machine Learning/Deep Learning, Docker, Bash Script, Python, NodeJS, VueJS, TypeScript (and JavaScript) and modern backend APIs. 👊
